title: satureja connata
intro: Satureja connata, also known as the native or bush savory, is a perennial herb native to Australia. It is a shrub-like plant with small white or pink flowers and a pungent, earthy scent. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Satureja connata include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its use in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves.
